title: Player Health Indicators Invisible Support
description: Gaider10's mod named "Player Health Indicators", but with support to see hearts of invisible players (ONLY WITH ARMOR!)
body:
## ⚠️ This mod is not the original [Player Health Indicators](https://modrinth.com/mod/playerhealthindicators)

**❗ This mod is incompatible with the original mod! You'll need to uninstall it to use this fork.**

This mod is an alternative version of the mod called [Player Health Indicators](https://modrinth.com/mod/playerhealthindicators), that allows you to see hearts of players with invisibility (**ONLY WHEN THEY HAVE ARMOR ON!**)

**Both mods are under MIT license.**
![Picture of the health indicator on a player.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a5a48d6153a125c9cf0d56e68d2b2dd30c26734.webp)
